channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Drain blocked, 20th May
item.description:
Drain blocked causing flooding in garages

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sherborne Street, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Double yellow lines disappearing and no parking signs missing, 20th May
item.description:
The DYL in Merestones rd leading to the school have been allowed to fade away. This means the road is full of parked cars at school pick up times causing seriously dangerous parking. It is causing chaos and at times it is impossible to drive down the road at all to turn left and get home. There is sufficient parking in Merestones Road for school collections . The councils neglect of the lines and signs is causing chaos and when there is an accident, which there will be, the fault lies with the council if you do nothing now you’ve been told. This is not NIMBYISN as there IS parking outside my house and I don’t object to that. The council needs to repaint these lines ASAP as it is now dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Merestones Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW10 Potholes problem, 20th May
item.description:
CW Pothole 900mm x 500mm x 44mm Temporary Closure 15min db ///trio.chairs.porch (CW10 Pothole)
